description: This video discusses the differences between Web3 and the Metaverse, highlighting their distinct focuses on user information control and user experience.
topic_summary: Web3 emphasizes user control over information [t=6:32], while the Metaverse focuses on the presentation and experience of that information [t=17:92]. The evolution from Web 1.0 to Web 3.0 is also explored [t=30:72].
